description: A candid color photograph of President Donald Trump boarding (or stepping onto the airstair of) the Marine One presidential helicopter on a green lawn in Washington, D.C. The white-topped, dark-green Sikorsky VH-3 helicopter dominates the frame with its rotor blades and a large American flag decal on the fuselage; the Jefferson Memorial dome is faintly visible in the hazy background at left. Trump, in a dark suit and tie, stands on the steps and raises his hand in a wave. A uniformed U.S. Marine in dress blues stands at the base of the stairs rendering a salute. The shot is a professional but unstaged event photograph with no on-image text, captions, or graphic overlays. The accompanying tweet frames it as Trump heading 'Back on the world stage' for a state visit to China. Intent: a stately, presidential image projecting power and statesmanship; it is a plain news/event photo, not a designed meme.
